TNK: T cells and NK (natural killer) cells (a combined T/NK lymphocyte population)
PDAC: pancreatic ductal adenocarcinoma cells (the malignant tumor epithelial cells)
FIBROBLASTS: fibroblasts (stromal connective-tissue cells; cancer-associated fibroblasts in a tumor context)
MYELOID: myeloid-lineage immune cells (e.g. macrophages, monocytes, dendritic cells, granulocytes)
ENDOTHELIAL: endothelial cells (cells lining blood and lymphatic vessels)
PERICYTES: pericytes (perivascular support cells that wrap capillaries)
ENDOCRINE: endocrine cells (hormone-secreting cells; pancreatic islet cells in this tissue)
ACINAR: acinar cells (exocrine pancreatic cells that secrete digestive enzymes)
PLASMA: plasma cells (terminally differentiated, antibody-secreting B cells)
MAST: mast cells (granulocytic immune cells involved in inflammation)
NA: not assigned - spots with no valid neighborhood or cell-type assignment
unknown: cells or spots with no confident cell-type assignment
type B pancreatic cell: insulin-producing beta cell of the pancreatic islet
type A enteroendocrine cell: glucagon-producing alpha cell of the pancreatic islet
pancreatic ductal cell: epithelial cell lining the pancreatic ducts
acinar cell: exocrine pancreatic cell that secretes digestive enzymes
